I concur with the assessment provided earlier. Laminoplasty (option C) indeed differs fundamentally because its primary goal is to create more room in the spinal canal by carefully manipulating the lamina structure but doesn't usually entail complete removal of any portion of the vertebral disc unless specifically indicated.
